parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ requests: [ { type: 'execute', stmt: { sql: "SELECT id, createdAt, name, email, phone, city, state, zipCode, source, gclid, keyword, status, jobValue, projectType, dumpsterSize FROM Lead WHERE spam = 0 ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 500" } }, { type: 'close' } ] }) }}
